race.comment: STOLI BOLLI (12) looks well placed down in the weights. He's come back well, winning 2/3, just getting into a tricky spot at Mornington two back. He was dominant sitting off a strong tempo at Bendigo with 59kg and drops to 54.5kg here, with proven experience down the straight. DE BERGERAC (7) comes down from Sydney in solid form, finding the line well behind a progressive horse in Signor Tortoni at Randwick in a BM88 last start. He hasn't won for a while but is right up to this at his best and should be coming home well late. FANCIFY (6) resumes, now with the Ciaron Maher yard (formerly Michael Hickmott). She's never missed a place at 1200m and goes well fresh. Keep safe if she's firm in betting. LOSESOMEWINMORE (8) struggled in the G3 Hawkes Stakes fresh but was kept safe in betting there and can improve quickly with great straight track form. POP AWARD (3) is a good little mare who should be thereabouts again.
